GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "This classic kitchen design is currently making a big comeback", "An icon for a reason.", "As the heart of the house, a kitchen should be more than just practical. Being one of the rooms we spend much of our time in, kitchen design should be given the same love and attention as the rest of the house—and as anyone who's ever been through a renovation can attest, there's a world of choice out there. Which is why we're going to make this decision making a little easier for you. A VL favourite, Smeg's reimagined Classic collection is the perfect addition to your next kitchen refresh. Steeped in design history (the collection currently sits in New York's Museum of Modern Art), the collection is nothing short of timeless, especially with all its modern updates. Originally designed by Italian architect Guido Canali 35 years ago, the Classic collection has gone on to become a Smeg staple and an icon of Italian design. Its clean lines and gentle aesthetic has earnt it many a place in kitchens around the world, no doubt thanks to its chameleon-like simplicity and superior technology. In other words, it's a firm favourite for a good reason. Featuring everything from cookers to coffee machines, the Classic collection has something for everyone. And with brand new, updated yet simple to use technology, it'll know what you want even before you do. Case in point: the extensive range of Classic ovens. Complete with Smeg's lauded ergonomic Canali knob, a touch screen and cooking presets for just about every dish (the perfect rare beef fillet or roast pork awaits—and yes, that's two of the settings), it makes cooking super easy. Masterchef or otherwise, the oven's futuristic approach to playing chef means there's plenty of simple-to-use smart technology to help you out. Smeg Classic ovens can also remember up to 64 of your personal recipes, and the 90cm oven is fitted with an innovative multi-step cooking function feature that is seriously a game changer. Plus, the pizza program is truly revolutionary. Napoli-style pizzas at home? Of course, the Italians can deliver. Energy efficient and easy to use, Smeg's Classic collection has been built to last. With simple to use smart technology for delicious results, Smeg's Classic collection not only looks good, but will turn any kitchen into a design masterpiece. It's hard to find fault in investing in history, right? Visit: smeg.com.au/classic"
